name: @colmbyrne/specflow
description: Specs that enforce themselves. Contract tests, journey hooks, and agent orchestration for LLM-driven development.

scripts.postinstall: echo '' && echo '╔═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗' && echo '║  @colmbyrne/specflow installed                       ║' && echo '╠═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╣' && echo '║                                                       ║' && echo '║  Run in EACH project you want to enforce:             ║' && echo '║                                                       ║' && echo '║    npx @colmbyrne/specflow init .                     ║' && echo '║                                                       ║' && echo '║  This creates hooks, contracts, agents, tests, and    ║' && echo '║  CLAUDE.md (or appends rules to your existing one).   ║' && echo '║  Then fill in the Project Context in CLAUDE.md.       ║' && echo '║                                                       ║' && echo '╚═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝' && echo ''
